finding_results.notes: Replaced the three-part thesis sequence ('That's the whole book right there' / 'The whole manual' / 'Don't let people keep margin. Make them need the system every hour.') with a fragmented engineer-register observation. Marcus now lists concrete sweep items ('Heat packs. Meds. Extra socks.'), then reaches for an infrastructure metaphor ('You pull the local cache, they gotta come back to the server every time they need—') before a cough breaks the sentence. The dependency insight remains legible through cache/server language but can no longer be quoted as a standalone thesis. Also removed the narrator commentary line ('It is obvious enough that it does not need answering') that validated the insight from outside the scene.

summary: Single finding addressed. Marcus's dying observation about Lena's confiscation sweep was revised from a composed, liftable maxim into fragmented engineer speech interrupted by organ failure. The dependency-control insight survives through infrastructure metaphor (local cache / server) anchored to concrete stash items, but arrives broken across a cough rather than as a balanced aphorism. Net reduction of four lines; no structural, continuity, or downstream-obligation changes.
